query:
SELECT 
  authorName,
  s3AvatarUrl,
  avatarUrl,
  lastAvatarPrompt,
  avatarGenVendor,
  avatarGenModel,
  avatarResearchVendor,
  bestReferencePhotoUrl,
  updatedAt
FROM author_profiles 
WHERE authorName IN ('Adam Grant', 'Brené Brown', 'Malcolm Gladwell')
ORDER BY authorName;
